venues.name: Rengstorff Park Pickleball Courts
venues.address: 201 S Rengstorff Ave, Mountain View, CA 94040
venues.netType: 2 permanent nets + 7 portable nets; 3 dedicated lined courts + 6 courts shared with tennis (dual-striped)
venues.weather: Milder, more moderate than inland South Bay courts
venues.notes: Pickleheads' court count (9) appears to count all playable courts, including the 6 shared/dual-striped-with-tennis courts, while the existing courts-data.json entry (courts: 3) counts only the fully dedicated pickleball courts. Pickleheads' own detail — '3 permanent lines and 6 shared with tennis' plus '2 permanent nets and 7 portable nets' — actually matches the existing entry's surface note ('3 dedicated (2 permanent nets, 1 lined-only) + 6 dual-striped with tennis') almost exactly, suggesting this is a counting-convention difference rather than a factual disagreement. Not resolved here per instructions — left as a conflict for human review. Lights recorded as false based on Pickleheads listing only 'restrooms' as an amenity for this venue and stating citywide that lights appear at just 1 Mountain View location (Google Athletic Recreation Field Park, not this one); no page explicitly says 'no lights' in those words. Reservations: Pickleheads states availability 'is not confirmed' — recorded as Not specified rather than inferring the existing record's 'Walk-up' value. lat/lon carried forward from existing assets/venues.json (not independently re-geocoded).

venues.name: Mountain View Sports Pavilion
venues.notes: Pickleheads corroborates court count (2), indoor status, hard surface, permanent lines/portable nets, and a required fee — no new fields beyond what the existing record already has, and no conflicts. A 4.2-star/28-review rating surfaced in one search but was traced to a different Mountain View Sports Pavilion in Arkansas, not this California venue — excluded, pickleheadsRating left null. lat/lon carried forward from existing assets/venues.json (not independently re-geocoded).

venues.name: Google Athletic Recreation Field Park
venues.weather: Milder, more moderate than inland South Bay courts
venues.notes: Pickleheads lists this as a private club/facility (Google's own campus recreation park, aka 'GARField'); other sources describe it as for Google employees and visitors, with code-required access — recorded price as 'Membership required' per the schema's literal-value convention, but flagging that public accessibility is uncertain (not a typical public-fee venue) for human review. This is a new venue not present in the existing Mountain View baseline. googleMapsUrl derived by converting the Google Maps place data's second hex component (0x9ab0e114a25d29d9) to decimal, per this project's established cid= convention. lat/lon sourced from a third-party aggregator (not Pickleheads itself), so treat as approximate.
